home.eyebrow: Arc Souk · the USDC-native art souk on Arc Network
home.subtitle: A luminous souk of one-of-a-kind gypsum sculptures. Connect a wallet, pay in USDC on Arc Network, and we ship the piece worldwide.
home.cardHint: Move your mouse — the card tilts
home.featuredSub: Each sculpture is cast, cured and finished by hand, then minted as a single edition. What you see is what ships.
home.statementSub: Cast in studio · paid in USDC · provenance on Arc

footer.rights: Arc Souk © 2026 — the on-chain art souk
footer.tagline: EN / عربي · USDC on Arc Network Testnet

auth.title: Welcome to Arc Souk
auth.subtitle: Sign in to buy, track orders, and manage your wallet.
auth.verifyNewAccount: We sent a 6-digit code to confirm your email and finish creating your account.
auth.verifyExisting: Please confirm your email first. We sent you a 6-digit code.
auth.resent: A new code is on its way.
auth.googleLinkConflict: This email already has a password account. Sign in with your password instead.
auth.googleFailed: Google sign-in didn't complete. Please try again.

about.empty: No description has been added yet.

how.title: How Arc Souk works
how.subtitle: From your wallet to your doorstep — paid in USDC on the Arc Network.
how.buy1: Sign in with email or your wallet
how.buy2: Browse the Shop and pick a piece
how.buy3: Pay in USDC on Arc — one transaction
how.buy4: We pack it and ship worldwide
how.a1: A one-of-a-kind drops on the Bids page
how.a2: Place a USDC bid — funds lock in the contract
how.a3: Highest bid when the timer ends wins; others are refunded
how.a4: The NFT lands in your wallet, then we craft & ship the physical piece
how.note: Every payment settles on-chain in USDC, so prices are stable and provenance is transparent.

bids.title: Live auctions
bids.subtitle: Bid in USDC on one-of-a-kind pieces. The highest bid when the timer ends wins — the NFT lands in your wallet, then we craft and ship the physical piece.
bids.none: No auctions right now. Check back soon.
bids.noBids: No bids yet — be the first.
bids.mustBeHigher: Your bid must be higher than the current bid.
